introSection:
Black Hole Scramble (Japanese: ブラックホールスクランブル) was an enclosed roller coaster located at Space World in Fukuoka, Japan. It was the only roller coaster built by the manufacturer, Nippon.

The ride closed on 31 December 2017 alongside the rest of Space World.
fullText:
Black Hole Scramble (Japanese: ブラックホールスクランブル) was an enclosed roller coaster located at Space World in Fukuoka, Japan. It was the only roller coaster built by the manufacturer, Nippon.

The ride closed on 31 December 2017 alongside the rest of Space World.



Black track and supports.
